title: Versioned document store with optimistic concurrency

difficulty.rationale: Requires durable SQLite persistence, transactional read-modify-write to prevent lost updates, correct RFC 7232 conditional-request semantics, and monotonic versioning that survives restarts.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /docs creates a document at version 1 with an ETag header.
PUT with a matching If-Match increments the version by exactly one.
PUT with a stale If-Match returns 409 with the current version.
Documents and versions survive a process restart.
must_not: Allow two concurrent updates on the same version to both succeed.
Apply an update when If-Match is absent.
edge_cases: DELETE without If-Match returns 428 and a matching DELETE returns 204.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
